learner_facing_content.title: Solving One-Step Linear Equations
learner_facing_content.learning_objective: Solve one-step equations using inverse operations.
learner_facing_content.explanation: A linear equation can be solved by keeping both sides balanced.
learner_facing_content.worked_example: If x + 3 = 10, subtract 3 from both sides, so x = 7.
learner_facing_content.practice_activity: Solve y + 5 = 12 and explain your step.
